rumor.detail: Deal confirmed: Cissé joining Belgian Charleroi; visa delays only remaining issue.

newIntel.reasoning: Jun 25 rumor showed agreement reached; Jul 3 article confirms deal finalized with visa as only procedural delay. Escalates from 'advanced' to 'confirmed' status based on post-agreement confirmation.

needsReview.detail: Contract expired Jun 30, 2026; current club status unknown as of Jul 9, 2026.
needsReview.reason: Contract expiry date (Jun 30, 2026) has passed. No post-expiry transfer news found. Pre-contract agreement with Sekhukhune was signed Apr 15, 2026 (advanced stage), but no confirmation of completion found in research. Current whereabouts and contract status require clarification.
